description: Uses quadratic residues in GF(p) to construct conference matrices and Hadamard matrices. For p ≡ 3 mod 4, the Jacobsthal matrix Q built from Legendre symbols is skew-symmetric with Q*Q^T = pI - J, yielding a skew Hadamard matrix of order p+1.
analogical_connections: Conference matrix as equiangular tight frame
implementation_hypothesis: For p=167: construct Jacobsthal matrix, form H(168) via Paley I. Verified H(168)*H(168)^T = 168*I.
experiment_seed: Implement Paley I for p=167 in NumPy. Verify. Use as building block for H(668) approaches.
